sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5086" key="a)/mbuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄμβυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n5086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄμβιξ</ref></xr>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.44</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
